title: cyclosorus merrillii
intro: Cyclosorus merrillii, also known as the Merrill's sword fern, is a species of fern that is native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus merrillii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be used to make teas or taken as a supplement to support overall well-being.
